title: RUNGANO RWA GURE
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: RUNGANO RWA GURE (The Story of Gure)

verses.text: 17.RUNGANO RWA GURE 13/01/26 Chitereresai apa,
Moses pachake sandiye akayambutsa ma ISRAEL
Ahaizvi kwanisa dai asina kupihwa TSVIMBO ye rudzi
Saka iyi TSVIMBO yakava nhaka ye musiranwa kubva kuna ABRAHAM ichienda kuna ISAAC ichizoenda kuna JAKOPO
Ndo iya ine RUNGANO rwa
ESAU na JACOB
Aifanira kupihwa TSVIMBO ndi ESAU
Asi yakazo pihwa JAKOPO
Zvakafamba so
kune vasinga zive rungano
ISAKA akunofa akati nhasi ndiri kuda kusira dangwe rangu TSVIMBO yerudzi
ISAKA aida kupa ESAU nekuti ndiye aiva dangwe uye ndiye wa ainyanyoda
Nekuti ESAU aipota achi igira BABA vake muto we mhuka dza ainge auraya sezvo aiva muvhimi
Asi Amai vaida JAKOPO
But JAKOPO aingovawo mufudzi we makwai
Saka Amai na JAKOPO vakarangana sezvizvi
BABA va BOFU , saka ngativa nyepere kuti iwe ndiwe JAKOPO
Jakopo akati ahhh pavachandi bata ruoko vachanzwa ndisina mvere mumaoko voziva kuti handisi ESAU
Amai vakabva vati ayewa ndine ZANO
Ngati tore dehwe tiputire ruoko Rwako Kuti pavachakubata vacha funga kuti imvere dza ESAU
Ndo kupihwa kwa JAKOPO
Musazo vhunza kuti SEI ndadzoka ndiri PA
CHISHANU kune vekwa MANUWERE
Ndisina kudzoka pa SATURDAY
Nezuro 12 JANUARY 2026 vakati BABA VADZOKA takuenda KU
Nekuti BABA VAKASIYA vati tosangana ku SYDNEY
Hamungati HURUMENDE ya NYARARA iyo isina
Hamungati JOHANI adzoka mupfungwa dzenyu
Hamungati muchinda Edward uyo , pasina aripo kunze kwenyu
Izvozvi nhasi Vachisvika Ku SYDNEY airport
Ini ndichisvikawo muhana dzenyu kuno
Kutaura kuti TAPESANA
Kwete kunetsana
Asi Tapesana
Ivo vachi svika ku SYDNEY
SYDNEY achi svika kuno
Ndo SIMBA re DENBHAI
Nhaka yaifanira kuva yavo , vachawana yava ye MUDIKI
Ndiri kurevesa
CHIREMA CHINE MAZANO
Handi pererwe ne MAZANO
Regai ndikuudzei rungano
Paiva nemumwe mukomana ainzi ABASID, mukomana uyu aigaro tambudzika ne mamwe madzimambo aidzvanyirira vanhu
Ne rimwe zuva izwi ra JEHOVAH rakauya kwa ari ndoku muti , ndinoda kuti vanodzvanyirira vanhu kungave ku church kana munyika vabve
ABASID ndokuti Mwari ndakunzwai asi ndino urawa
Zvikanzi na MWARI vanenge vaziva sei kuti ndiwe
ABASID akabva ati vanondiona ka FACE yangu
Zvikanzi nezwi ayewa tichavamba so
Uchaita masvondo manomwe sabata rega rega uchipinda mu guta wakashonga so uchitamba
Abasid akaita masvondo manomwe achino tamba muguta
Kare kare aka
Vanhu vaiungana
Vaimuti ndiwe ani
Aisa pindura kusvika vangoti GURE
Saka GURE aityisa
Mushure me masvondo manomwe, izwi rakazoti kuna ABASID chienda kudzimba dze vose vari kudzvanyirira vanhu uno vaudza kuti vasiye tsika iyoyo
Kana ari mukuru ku sa PHAROAH aingo ona vhura ziso Husiku Oona GURE akamira
Airohwa ne BUKA
Vamwe vainge vanyanya kutyisa vanhu vaitofa ne BUKA chete
GURE asina kuuraya munhu
Vainge vapona vaizo taura pachavo kuti mmm ini handichada, hameno zvako na GURE
Kozoita vai ita nharo, vakatanga kuti kuvanhu , achati udza kuti GURE ndiani tino mupa mari
Nekuti GURE ati tambudza
Apo hapana munhu ari kuziva GURE kunze kwa MWARI
Saka vaito svika kuna ABASID voti nhai GURE ndi ANI
ABASID wotiwo HAMENO
Asi manje GURE anga akutodiwa ne vanhu
Kunyanya vai dzvanyirirwa vacho
Saka vanhu vose vaitambura vanga vakuti GURE ahacha uyi kuzotamba SABATA, saka ticha muwanepiko GURE
Tiri kungonzwa kuti nhasi avhurumutsa madzimambo aka buda mumba achitiza GURE
IZWI rakadzoka kuna GURE rikati BASA rakura pakuda vamwe ana GURE
ABASID ndokuti kuna MWARI vanhu havana SECRET , makuda kundi urayisa manje
MWARI akati kana tichaita veku sarudza
ABASID akabva apihwa nzira yeku tsvaga nayo ana GURE vaka vimbika
Saka aka tanga nevaiva pedyo ndoku tora 1 by 1
Akatora sezvizvi
Aka svika kune vekutanga ndokuti,
Haaa ini ndakuziva GURE
Shamwari dzakati uno nyepa , hakuna anoziva GURE shamwari
ABASID akati ndiri KUREVESA
Ndakuziva kuti GURE ndi ANI,
Shamwari se munhu anga akuda gure zvakanyanya, akabva ati ndiratidze GURE
ABASID akati manje ukaona GURE unenge wava kufanira kutoitawo GURE
Shamwari ikati ehe ndoda
ABASID ndokuti handei tino muona kuguva rake GURE.
Nekuti GURE ahasi munhu
Ndokuenda ku makuva, Abasid ndoku uraya huku
Zva anga arairwa na Mwari
Ndikuti ku shamwari inwa mbiya ye ropa iyi,
ShaMwari ikati handigone
ABASID ndokuti saka GURE haumuone
Shamwari nekuda kuona GURE yakabva yati horaiti chindipa ndinwe
Ndokubva yanwa
Yapedza ndokuti but GURE handisi kumuona ka
ABASID ndokubva ati hausati wa pedza test yese
Chasara uri kufanira kurara muguva iri, makuseni paona muka uchamuona GURE
Ini ndakuenda
Sha Mwari ikati , ini ndiri kuda kuona GURE saka ndorara hangu muguva racho
ABASID ndokuenda hake
SHAMWARI ndokusara muguva riya
Yai ita kunonzi kubvunda
Asi ne shungu dzekuda kuona GURE yaka shingirira
Ava mashamba nzou IZWI ra JEHOVAH rakati kuna ABASID , Chishonga sa GURE , usakanganwe taka siya mwana we varidzi ku makuva nezuro
Mukomana arara muma kuva ahana kukotsira kana piec nekutya akangonzwa kuseni GURE achiridza ka ngoma achitamba
Gure ndokusviko kanda tambo achiti bata ne papa
Mukomana uya nde kubuda muguva se kumuka kwe munhu anga afa
GURE ndo kutanga kutamba
PADAGU PADAGU
Shamwari ndokuona mutambiro waita GURE,
Ndokubva ati zveshuwa ndiwo mutambiro wa GURE wa ai ita SABATA rega rega
Zvadaro GURE akabva abvisa CHI MASK chiya
Shamwari ndokuti
ABASID ndokuti Sha MWARI usa shamisike nekuti Newewo watova GURE , yako face iyi
Asi ukangotaura chete kuti GURE ndi ani SECRET yako yekurara ku MAKUVA ichabuda
Saka kurara ku MAKUVA kwaisava kutsvaga mweya yevanhu vakafa
Asi haiva nzira yeku chengetedza secret ya GURE
Zvaisava ne mushonga mukati
Kana vafi mukati
Saka kwakazova nana GURE vaipfuura 1000
Vasinga zivikanwe
Kusvika vazo torera madzimambo humambo
Chanda shandisiro mufananidzo wa GURE nde ichi
Chinonzi KUNAMATA ibasa
Chinonzi JESU ibasa
Basa rakaitwa na GURE murungano urwo rakanunura vanhu
GURE aitova JESU
Nekuti chinonzi Jeso ibasa reku nunura vanhu
Munhu akapfeka Gamenzi anogona kutoita iye SATAN
Asi GURE ari iye MWARI
Uno fanira kutanga waziva chionzero chekuti sei GURE azopfeka so
Izwi riri kungoti
Kuti ZVITYISE
Uye pashaye anozo tevera mutumbi
Nekuti hapana achauziva
Ndo zvakapa kuti va ROMA vazo bvunza JUDAS , kuti ko iwe GURE ndiani
Nekuti hapana aiziva GURE
Vanhu vose vanga vangova ana GURE
GURE abatwa peter akanzi iwe ndiwe mumwe waifamba na GURE ka
Peter akati ahhh handisi GURE
Handina kumbo bvira ndafamba na GURE
Kwete ana GURE venyu vanhasi, vekuti anoto buda pa TV achiti ndinotamba zvigure, mask yangu nde iyi achimwene
Ayewa ava ndana GURE vekutedzera mukuru wema GURE
Ndo vanoti ndarara ku MAKUVA kuti ndishande ne mweya MUFI
Ndovano bata mushonga
Isu hatina isu
Vanhu vaito ziva kuti mukuru we GURE anoda hunhu
Ukaita zvekutamba hama dzako dzinoti ko andepi watorwa nana GURE
Ko ihondo ka
Chibvisai zita rekuti ABASID muru ngano urwu moisa JESU
Mobvisa pekuti GURE moisa Mwari
JESU aishonga nguwo ya MWARI SABATA roga roga achino fadza vanhu kwe masvondo manomwe kuti vambo kanganwa kuti vari munhamo
Asi pakazoita NGUVA yekuti JESU akati, BASA ratanga, rekuchibvisa nhamo
Kwete kuvaraidza vanhu asi vari munhamo
Ndo pa akavamba kushanyira madzimambo mumisha yavo
Akashonga hu MWARI
Asi nekuda kwekupenya kwaiva ma ari havai kwanisa kumutarisa huso
Iye JESU akazo tora vepedyo ndo kuvati
MAKUVA= YOU ARE BECOMING
Manga muri mu MAKUVA
Kubva nhasi chibuda
Nekuti watova
Asi kana wa GURE sa INI ziva kuti muhana takuti
ITYAI MAIKORO IYE IYE IYE,
ITYAI MAIKORO MUTUNGAMIRI WE MWEYA
Anofamba na GABRIERE IYE IYE IYE, ANOFAMBA NA GABRIERE MUTUNGAMIRI WE NGIROZI
Kutaura kuti Kana VADA
Tino tungamidza MAIKORO
Nekuti ndiye anoda HUNHU
Izvezvi ndato pedza nemi,
Enda uno taura kuti GURE ndiani wabva pano, Tinosangana kumba kwako
Hamundi manikidze kutiwo NGA
Nema verse enyu ekuchechi
Imi musingade IDI
Ini ndichafamba se chigure chiri pa Idi
Imi mosara sengirozi DZE NHEMA
Ndo MASHOKO angu ku mapositori
Apa pava kuda MAIKORO
Munhu ane makumbo maviri anoita se ano dhonzerana
Ndo nyama ne mweya
Mweya ukati nyama haina basa, hapana kwauno svika
Naiyo nyama yakati mweya hauna basa haina kwaino svika
Imba ikareba sei kuenda kudenga, kana isina foundation yakadzika inowa
Pakutsvaga zvekudenga kumusoro soro,
Tsvagaiwo zve pasi zvakadzika dzika
Ndokuti HAMUNGA TAURE jesu wekudenga denga musina kutaura zva Chaminuka we pasi pasi
Waziva izvi wachatisa nyama ne mweya
Nekuti nyama yakabva pasi pasi ku rudzi rwako
Mweya wakabva kudenga denga kuna BABA
Nyama inoti TIRI VANA VEVHU
Kutaura AMAI
Mweya uchiti tiri vana Vedenga , kutaura BABA
Ndo pamusina kunzwisisa MICHO
Dare re MASOWE
Kwazvaka vambira kusvika kwa zvino fanira kugumira kunyangwe zvisinga gume
Kana vacharamba vari pano
Mukuru we GURE anoda HUNHU
